channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live updates: Trump says Iran war could last weeks, US citizens in more than a dozen countries urged to leave - AP News
item.description:
1. Live updates: Trump says Iran war could last weeks, US citizens in more than a dozen countries urged to leave  AP News
  2. Trump Signals U.S. Is Prepared for a Long War Against Iran  The New York Times
  3. Iran war live: Iran says Strait of Hormuz closed and warns it will attack ships trying to pass  Reuters
  4. Trump defends Iran strikes, offers objectives for military operation  NPR
  5. Iran Strikes to Last for Weeks, Trump Suggests  WSJ

item.title: Starmer seeks to carve out distinct UK approach to this conflict - BBC
item.description:
1. Starmer seeks to carve out distinct UK approach to this conflict  BBC
  2. Brushing off Trump criticism, UK's Starmer defends actions over Iran  Reuters
  3. UK ‘took far too long’ to let US use its airbases to attack Iran, Trump says  The Guardian
  4. France, Germany and U.K. Open Door to Striking Iranian Launchers  WSJ
  5. Starmer lets US use bases for Iran clash: UK’s military, legal quagmire  Al Jazeera

item.title: France to increase nuclear arsenal and European weapons cooperation, Macron says - The Guardian
item.description:
1. France to increase nuclear arsenal and European weapons cooperation, Macron says  The Guardian

  4. Macron Expands French Nuclear Arsenal and Vows Protection for Neighbors  The New York Times
  5. France offers to deploy nuclear deterrent across Europe for first time  Financial Times

item.title: Israel strikes Lebanon as conflict broadens throughout Middle East - Politico
item.description:
1. Israel strikes Lebanon as conflict broadens throughout Middle East  Politico
  2. Iran conflict widens to Lebanon, Kuwait mistakenly downs US jets  Reuters

  4. Hezbollah just restarted the fight that Israel was waiting to finish  CNN
  5. Israel kills 31 in Beirut strike following Hezbollah rocket attack  Al Jazeera

item.title: Inside the plan to kill Ali Khamenei - Financial Times
item.description:
1. Inside the plan to kill Ali Khamenei  Financial Times
  2. Which Iranian Leaders Have Been Killed and Who Survived?  WSJ
  3. World leaders are almost never killed in war. Why did it happen to Iran’s supreme leader?  vox.com
  4. Khamenei's death met with public mourning, quiet celebrations as regime's opponents wait for an opening  NBC News
  5. The C.I.A. Helped Pinpoint a Gathering of Iranian Leaders. Then Israel Struck.  The New York Times

item.title: Pakistan Strikes Bagram Air Base, Satellite Images Show - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Pakistan Strikes Bagram Air Base, Satellite Images Show  The New York Times

  3. Afghan Taliban reportedly target Pakistani jets over Kabul  DW.com
  4. Pakistan, Afghanistan show no signs of stepping back as fighting enters fifth day  Reuters
  5. From backer to enemy — how Pakistan turned on the Taliban  Financial Times

item.title: Limited flights from UAE begin as governments seek to extract citizens from Middle East - AP News
item.description:
1. Limited flights from UAE begin as governments seek to extract citizens from Middle East  AP News

  4. UAE airlines to resume limited number of flights, mainly for repatriations  Reuters
  5. Airlines Resume Some UAE Flights Amid Ongoing Iran War Disruption  Aviation Week

item.title: European military installations are targeted in Iran retaliation - Defense News
item.description:

item.title: US 'stonewalling' requests by Gulf states to replenish interceptors, sources say - Middle East Eye
item.description:
1. US 'stonewalling' requests by Gulf states to replenish interceptors, sources say  Middle East Eye

  4. Reports suggest Gulf states running out of interceptor missiles  France 24

item.title: Inside Iran's succession: who could replace Ali Khamenei? - ایران اینترنشنال
item.description:

  5. Who Could Take Over for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei?  The New York Times

item.title: Iran vows to attack any ship trying to pass through Strait of Hormuz - Reuters
item.description:

  4. Iran conflict disrupts global shipping as tankers are stranded, damaged  Reuters

item.title: The hole in the sky: How Middle East airspace closures are reshaping global aviation - CNN
item.description:

  4. Asia airline stocks drop while energy shares rise as Iran conflict escalates  CNBC
  5. Middle East Operation Poses Challenges for Airlines  WSJ

item.title: India and Canada reset ties with 'landmark' nuclear energy deal - BBC
item.description:

item.title: Qatar shoots down two Iranian Su-24 fighter jets over airspace as Gulf states suffer Iran strikes - The Jerusalem Post
item.description:
1. Qatar shoots down two Iranian Su-24 fighter jets over airspace as Gulf states suffer Iran strikes  The Jerusalem Post

item.title: Iran attack on giant Saudi refinery pushes up oil prices - Axios
item.description:

item.title: We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said. - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said.  The Washington Post
  2. CNN poll: 59% of Americans disapprove of Iran strikes and most think a long-term conflict is likely  CNN
  3. 6 Conservative Voters React to Attacks on Iran Ahead of the Texas Primaries  The New York Times
  4. Trump: ‘I don’t care about polling’ showing Iran strikes unpopular  The Hill
  5. Just one in four Americans say they back US strikes on Iran, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds  Reuters

item.title: Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks  CBS News
  2. No warning, no siren: Six US service members killed in Iranian strike that hit makeshift operations center in Kuwait  CNN
  3. Centcom raises ‘Epic Fury’ death toll to 6 service members  The Hill
  4. U.S. troops killed amid Iranian counterattack, fueling air defense fears  The Washington Post
  5. CENTCOM says 2 more US servicemembers killed in Iran fighting, raising death toll to 6  The Times of Israel

item.title: Live Updates: U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran widens - PBS
item.description:
1. Live Updates: U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran widens  PBS
  2. March 1, 2026 — Day two of the launch of a US-Israeli military operation against Iran  CNN
  3. Opinion | An Unwise and Unconstitutional Attack on Iran  WSJ
  4. Trump says 'we expect casualties' after Iran strikes but 'in the end it's going to be a great deal for the world'  NBC News
  5. Earthquake in the Gulf: Iran war expands to dozen countries in 72 hours  Axios
